did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper uses numerical simulation methods, specifically the Finite Difference Time Domain (FDTD) method and the CST Microwave Studio simulator, to model terahertz sensing for skin cancer (basal cell carcinoma). It does not employ artificial intelligence, machine learning, or deep learning algorithms to obtain its results.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
